hero.title: Cubic
hero.subtitle:
CubicMC Launcher is a customand open source Minecraft launcher that
 lets you play with an offline account without any restrictions.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: CubicMc is an open source launcher. All the launcher code is available under the MIT license.

drmFree.title: DRM-free
drmFree.description: Easily play Minecraft without any restrictions, even if you don't have an online account.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: CubicMc is fast because its interface and code base are optimized and also the library for the minecraft version is very fast.
